micro_skills.description: Select appropriate UI patterns for the task context.
Reduce steps and complexity in user flows.
Improve clarity and reduce mental effort.
Specify interaction states, transitions, and feedback.
Assess accessibility concerns and constraints.
Apply UX laws and principles from the local knowledgebase to decisions.
Select patterns using the knowledgebase pattern selection logic.
Select components using the knowledgebase component selection matrix.
Run UX evaluation and audit checklists from the knowledgebase.
Define system boundaries, data flow, and contracts.
Build UI components with clear state and behavior.
Implement API endpoints and validation.
Validate state ownership and update patterns.
Evaluate and address performance risks.
Review system for security risks and mitigations.
Assess PII and sensitive data handling.
Validate authentication and authorization boundaries.
Check API exposure, validation, and abuse risks.
Check frontend risks like XSS and token storage.
Assess dependency risks and supply chain exposure.
